tag.name: ポップアップUI - 秋田県向けYouTube告知（右下）

parameter.value:
<script>
(function () {
  var POPUP_ID = 'gtm-akita-listing-youtube-popup';
  var STYLE_ID = 'gtm-akita-listing-youtube-popup-style';
  var TARGET_URL = 'https://youtube.com/live/ebkV9hnEAGQ';
  var TEXT_LABEL = '\u516c\u958b\u4e2d';
  var TEXT_LINE1 = '\u79cb\u7530\u770c\u306e\u65b9\u9650\u5b9a';
  var TEXT_LINE2 = '\u30ea\u30b9\u30c6\u30a3\u30f3\u30b0\u5e83\u544a\u306e\u8a2d\u5b9a\u65b9\u6cd5\u3092\u516c\u958b\u4e2d';
  var TEXT_CTA = '\u52d5\u753b\u3092\u898b\u308b >';
  var TEXT_CLOSE_ARIA = '\u30dd\u30c3\u30d7\u30a2\u30c3\u30d7\u3092\u9589\u3058\u308b';

  if (document.getElementById(POPUP_ID)) return;

  var style = document.getElementById(STYLE_ID);
  if (!style) {
    style = document.createElement('style');
    style.id = STYLE_ID;
    style.textContent = '' +
      '#' + POPUP_ID + ' {position:fixed;right:16px;bottom:16px;z-index:2147483000;font-family:"Hiragino Kaku Gothic ProN","Yu Gothic","Meiryo",sans-serif;}' +
      '#' + POPUP_ID + ' .card {display:block;width:300px;max-width:calc(100vw - 32px);text-decoration:none;background:linear-gradient(145deg,#0f172a,#111827);color:#fff;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.18);border-radius:14px;box-shadow:0 14px 34px rgba(0,0,0,.34);padding:14px 14px 12px;line-height:1.5;}' +
      '#' + POPUP_ID + ' .label {display:inline-block;background:#ef4444;color:#fff;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.02em;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:999px;margin:0 0 8px;}' +
      '#' + POPUP_ID + ' .line1 {font-size:18px;font-weight:700;margin:0 0 4px;}' +
      '#' + POPUP_ID + ' .line2 {font-size:15px;font-weight:500;opacity:.98;margin:0 0 8px;}' +
      '#' + POPUP_ID + ' .cta {font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#fde68a;}' +
      '#' + POPUP_ID + ' .close {position:absolute;top:-10px;right:-10px;width:24px;height:24px;border:none;border-radius:999px;background:#111827;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 6px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.25);line-height:24px;padding:0;font-size:15px;}' +
      '#' + POPUP_ID + ' .close:focus {outline:2px solid #93c5fd;outline-offset:2px;}';
    document.head.appendChild(style);
  }

  var root = document.createElement('div');
  root.id = POPUP_ID;

  var closeButton = document.createElement('button');
  closeButton.type = 'button';
  closeButton.className = 'close';
  closeButton.setAttribute('aria-label', TEXT_CLOSE_ARIA);
  closeButton.innerHTML = '×';
  closeButton.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();
    if (root.parentNode) root.parentNode.removeChild(root);
  });

  var link = document.createElement('a');
  link.className = 'card';
  link.href = TARGET_URL;
  link.target = '_blank';
  link.rel = 'noopener noreferrer';


  link.addEventListener('click', function () {
    window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
    window.dataLayer.push({
      event: 'akita_popup_youtube_click',
      popup_id: POPUP_ID,
      popup_position: 'bottom_right',
      destination_url: TARGET_URL
    });
  });
  var pLabel = document.createElement('p');
  pLabel.className = 'label';
  pLabel.textContent = TEXT_LABEL;

  var pLine1 = document.createElement('p');
  pLine1.className = 'line1';
  pLine1.textContent = TEXT_LINE1;

  var pLine2 = document.createElement('p');
  pLine2.className = 'line2';
  pLine2.textContent = TEXT_LINE2;

  var pCta = document.createElement('p');
  pCta.className = 'cta';
  pCta.textContent = TEXT_CTA;

  link.appendChild(pLabel);
  link.appendChild(pLine1);
  link.appendChild(pLine2);
  link.appendChild(pCta);

  root.appendChild(closeButton);
  root.appendChild(link);
  document.body.appendChild(root);
})();
</script>

trigger.name: PV - 全ページ（秋田ポップアップ対象のみ）

parameter.value: {{JS - 秋田ポップアップ表示対象（セッション）}}
